insertion-no-spurious-groups

PASSAfter accepting a streaming stage that inserts lines below cursor, a follow-up FIM completion with stale EndLineInc should not treat already-accepted buffer lines as changes
Step 0: completion PASS
startLine=3 endLineInc=3 lines=7 → extractedEnd=6

Buffer

1import numpy as np23def bubble_sort(arr):4    n = len(arr)5    for i in range(n): 6        for j in range(0, n - i - 1):

Old (extracted)

3def bubble_sort(arr):4    n = len(arr)5    for i in range(n):6        for j in range(0, n - i - 1):

New (completion)

1def bubble_sort(arr):2    n = len(arr)3    for i in range(n):4        for j in range(0, n - i - 1):5            if arr[j] > arr[j + 1]:6                arr[j], arr[j + 1] = arr[j + 1], arr[j]7    return arr

After Accept

1import numpy as np23def bubble_sort(arr):4    n = len(arr)5    for i in range(n):6        for j in range(0, n - i - 1):7            if arr[j] > arr[j + 1]:8                arr[j], arr[j + 1] = arr[j + 1], arr[j]9    return arr
Groups: addition @7
JSON { "completion": { "startLine": 3, "endLineInc": 3, "lines": [ "def bubble_sort(arr):", " n = len(arr)", " for i in range(n):", " for j in range(0, n - i - 1):", " if arr[j] \u003e arr[j + 1]:", " arr[j], arr[j + 1] = arr[j + 1], arr[j]", " return arr" ] }, "oldLines": [ "def bubble_sort(arr):", " n = len(arr)", " for i in range(n):", " for j in range(0, n - i - 1):" ], "stages": [ { "StartLine": 7, "Groups": [ { "Type": "addition", "StartLine": 1, "EndLine": 3, "BufferLine": 7, "RenderHint": "", "ColStart": 0, "ColEnd": 0, "Lines": [ " if arr[j] \u003e arr[j + 1]:", " arr[j], arr[j + 1] = arr[j + 1], arr[j]", " return arr" ] } ], "CursorLine": 3, "CursorCol": 14 } ] }

multi-stage-accept-shows-next-directly

PASSAfter accepting the first stage, the next stage is shown directly when it's within proximity threshold and inside viewport.
Step 0: completion PASS
startLine=1 endLineInc=7 lines=7 → extractedEnd=7

Buffer

1line 12mod_a_old3line 34line 45line 56mod_b_old7line 7

New (completion)

Groups: modification @2 modification @6

PASSAfter accepting the first stage, the engine transitions to hasCursorTarget pointing at the next stage when it's beyond proximity threshold.

startLine=1 endLineInc=7 lines=7 → extractedEnd=7

multi-stage-line-count-shift

PASSFirst stage expands one line into three; the second stage's buffer position shifts by +2 so the second modification still lands on the right line after acceptance.
Step 0: completion PASS
startLine=1 endLineInc=7 lines=9 → extractedEnd=7

Buffer

1def first():2    pass3line 34line 45line 56line 67old_line_7

Old (extracted)

1def first():2    pass3line 34line 45line 56line 67old_line_7

New (completion)

1def first():2    x = 13    y = 24    print(x + y)5line 36line 47line 58line 69new_line_7

After Accept

1def first():2    x = 13    y = 24    print(x + y)5line 36line 47line 58line 69new_line_7
Groups: modification @2 addition @3 modification @7
JSON { "completion": { "startLine": 1, "endLineInc": 7, "lines": [ "def first():", " x = 1", " y = 2", " print(x + y)", "line 3", "line 4", "line 5", "line 6", "new_line_7" ] }, "oldLines": [ "def first():", " pass", "line 3", "line 4", "line 5", "line 6", "old_line_7" ], "stages": [ { "StartLine": 2, "Groups": [ { "Type": "modification", "StartLine": 1, "EndLine": 1, "BufferLine": 2, "RenderHint": "replace_chars", "ColStart": 4, "ColEnd": 9, "Lines": [ " x = 1" ] }, { "Type": "addition", "StartLine": 2, "EndLine": 3, "BufferLine": 3, "RenderHint": "", "ColStart": 0, "ColEnd": 0, "Lines": [ " y = 2", " print(x + y)" ] } ], "CursorLine": 3, "CursorCol": 16 }, { "StartLine": 7, "Groups": [ { "Type": "modification", "StartLine": 1, "EndLine": 1, "BufferLine": 7, "RenderHint": "replace_chars", "ColStart": 0, "ColEnd": 3, "Lines": [ "new_line_7" ] } ], "CursorLine": 1, "CursorCol": 3 } ] }

prefetch-extends-beyond-used-on-accept

PASSA stashed prefetch covering content beyond the accepted stage is used automatically on accept (no separate prefetch step needed).

prefetch-insertion-no-spurious-deletion

Buffer

5}

New (completion)

After Accept

prefetch-overlapping-cleared

PASSA stashed prefetch that overlaps the accepted stage but doesn't extend beyond it is cleared, not used. After accept the engine triggers a new prefetch and goes idle because the cursor target is close.
Step 0: completion PASS
startLine=2 endLineInc=2 lines=1 → extractedEnd=2

Buffer

1function add(a, b) {2 3}

Old (extracted)

2

New (completion)

trim-trailing-matching-lines

PASSModel overruns past EndLineInc with trailing lines that already match the buffer; processCompletion trims that suffix so it isn't treated as a no-op modification.
Step 0: completion PASS
startLine=2 endLineInc=2 lines=3 → extractedEnd=4

Buffer

1def main():2    pass3    foo4    bar

Old (extracted)

2    pass3    foo4    bar

New (completion)

1    x = 12    foo3    bar

After Accept

1def main():2    x = 13    foo4    bar
Groups: modification @2
JSON { "completion": { "startLine": 2, "endLineInc": 2, "lines": [ " x = 1", " foo", " bar" ] }, "oldLines": [ " pass", " foo", " bar" ], "stages": [ { "StartLine": 2, "Groups": [ { "Type": "modification", "StartLine": 1, "EndLine": 1, "BufferLine": 2, "RenderHint": "replace_chars", "ColStart": 4, "ColEnd": 9, "Lines": [ " x = 1" ] } ], "CursorLine": 1, "CursorCol": 9 } ] }
